---
title: "Roadmap"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{python}
#| label: roadmap
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
from itables import init_notebook_mode, show

init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

# Load tasks
df = pd.read_csv('./roadmap/tasks.csv')
if 'Priority' not in df.columns:
    df['Priority'] = 0

# Ensure Effort is numeric, fill missing with 0, and filter out negative Effort
df['Effort'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Effort'], errors='coerce').fillna(0)
df = df[df['Effort'] >= 0]

# Filter out completed and archived tasks
if 'Completed_on' in df.columns:
    df = df[df['Completed_on'].isna()]
if 'Archived_on' in df.columns:
    df = df[df['Archived_on'].isna() | (df['Archived_on'] == '')]
df = df.drop(columns=['Completed_on', 'Archived_on'], errors='ignore')

# Reorder columns
if 'Created_on' in df.columns:
    df = df[['Category', 'Task', 'Priority', 'Effort', 'Notes', 'Created_on']]
else:
    df = df[['Category', 'Task', 'Priority', 'Effort', 'Notes']]

# Latency: age in days since Created_on
import numpy as np
from datetime import datetime
min_size = 10
max_size = 100
def compute_latency(row):
    try:
        if 'Created_on' not in row or pd.isna(row['Created_on']):
            return np.nan
        created = pd.to_datetime(row['Created_on'], errors='coerce')
        if pd.isna(created):
            return np.nan
        return (datetime.now() - created).days
    except Exception:
        return np.nan
df['Latency'] = df.apply(compute_latency, axis=1)

# Pareto frontier: Priority vs Latency
try:
    from pymoo.util.non_dominated_sorting import NonDominatedSorting
    mask_valid_pl = df[['Latency', 'Priority']].notnull().all(axis=1)
    F_pl = np.column_stack([ -df.loc[mask_valid_pl, 'Latency'].to_numpy(),
                             -df.loc[mask_valid_pl, 'Priority'].to_numpy() ])
    nds = NonDominatedSorting()
    front_idx = nds.do(F_pl, only_non_dominated_front=True)
    pareto_indices_pl = df.loc[mask_valid_pl].iloc[front_idx].index
    df['Pareto'] = False
    df.loc[pareto_indices_pl, 'Pareto'] = True
    df['Task_Display'] = df.apply(lambda r: f"{r['Task']} 🚨" if r['Pareto'] else r['Task'], axis=1)
except Exception:
    df_sorted = df.sort_values(by="Latency", ascending=False)
    pareto_tasks = []
    max_priority = float('-inf')
    for _, row in df_sorted.iterrows():
        if row["Priority"] >= max_priority:
            pareto_tasks.append(row["Task"])
            max_priority = row["Priority"]
    df["Pareto"] = df["Task"].isin(pareto_tasks)
    df["Task_Display"] = df.apply(lambda r: f"{r['Task']} 🚨" if r["Pareto"] else r['Task'], axis=1)

# Pareto: Effort vs Priority
try:
    mask_valid_ep = df[['Effort', 'Priority']].notnull().all(axis=1)
    F_ep = np.column_stack([ df.loc[mask_valid_ep, 'Effort'].to_numpy(),
                             -df.loc[mask_valid_ep, 'Priority'].to_numpy() ])
    nds = NonDominatedSorting()
    front_idx_ep = nds.do(F_ep, only_non_dominated_front=True)
    pareto_indices_ep = df.loc[mask_valid_ep].iloc[front_idx_ep].index
    df['Pareto_EP'] = False
    df.loc[pareto_indices_ep, 'Pareto_EP'] = True
except Exception:
    df_sorted_ep = df.sort_values(by="Effort", ascending=True)
    pareto_tasks_ep = []
    max_priority_ep = float('-inf')
    for _, row in df_sorted_ep.iterrows():
        if row["Priority"] >= max_priority_ep:
            pareto_tasks_ep.append(row["Task"])
            max_priority_ep = row["Priority"]
    df["Pareto_EP"] = df["Task"].isin(pareto_tasks_ep)

# Pareto: Effort vs Latency
try:
    mask_valid_el = df[['Effort', 'Latency']].notnull().all(axis=1)
    F_el = np.column_stack([ df.loc[mask_valid_el, 'Effort'].to_numpy(),
                             -df.loc[mask_valid_el, 'Latency'].to_numpy() ])
    nds = NonDominatedSorting()
    front_idx_el = nds.do(F_el, only_non_dominated_front=True)
    pareto_indices_el = df.loc[mask_valid_el].iloc[front_idx_el].index
    df['Pareto_EL'] = False
    df.loc[pareto_indices_el, 'Pareto_EL'] = True
except Exception:
    df_sorted_el = df.sort_values(by="Effort", ascending=True)
    pareto_tasks_el = []
    max_latency_el = float('-inf')
    for _, row in df_sorted_el.iterrows():
        if row["Latency"] >= max_latency_el:
            pareto_tasks_el.append(row["Task"])
            max_latency_el = row["Latency"]
    df["Pareto_EL"] = df["Task"].isin(pareto_tasks_el)

df['Pareto_label'] = df['Pareto'].map({True: 'Pareto Optimal', False: 'Dominated'})
df['Pareto_EP_label'] = df['Pareto_EP'].map({True: 'Pareto Optimal', False: 'Dominated'})
df['Pareto_EL_label'] = df['Pareto_EL'].map({True: 'Pareto Optimal', False: 'Dominated'})

effort_valid = df["Effort"].dropna()
if not effort_valid.empty:
    effort_norm = (df["Effort"] - effort_valid.min()) / (effort_valid.max() - effort_valid.min() + 1e-6)
    marker_sizes = min_size + (max_size - min_size) * (effort_norm ** 3)
    marker_sizes = marker_sizes.fillna(min_size)
else:
    marker_sizes = pd.Series([min_size] * len(df), index=df.index)

fig = px.scatter(
    df,
    x="Latency",
    y="Priority",
    color="Pareto_label",
    size=marker_sizes,
    hover_data=["Task", "Category", "Notes", "Effort", "Latency", "Created_on"],
    title="Feature Roadmap: Priority vs Latency (Pareto Frontier, Circle Size = Effort)",
    labels={"Latency": "Age (days)", "Priority": "Priority", "Pareto_label": "Optimality", "Effort": "Effort (1-100 Scale)", "Created_on": "Created"},
    color_discrete_map={"Pareto Optimal": "#F4A261", "Dominated": "#6C757D"}
)

pareto_points = df[df["Pareto"]].sort_values(by="Latency", ascending=False)
if len(pareto_points) > 1:
    fig.add_scatter(
        x=pareto_points["Latency"],
        y=pareto_points["Priority"],
        mode="lines",
        line=dict(dash="dot", width=2),
        name="Pareto Frontier"
    )

fig.update_layout(plot_bgcolor='white')
fig.update_xaxes(showgrid=True, gridcolor='gray', gridwidth=1, autorange="reversed")
fig.update_yaxes(showgrid=True, gridcolor='gray', gridwidth=1)

print("""
**Hover over the dots** to see detailed information about each task.
""")

fig.show()

fig_ep = px.scatter(
    df,
    x="Effort",
    y="Priority",
    color="Pareto_EP_label",
    size=marker_sizes,
    hover_data=["Task", "Category", "Notes", "Effort", "Priority", "Latency", "Created_on"],
    title="Feature Roadmap: Effort vs Priority (Pareto Frontier, Circle Size = Effort)",
    labels={"Effort": "Effort (1-100 Scale, lower is better)", "Priority": "Priority", "Pareto_EP_label": "Optimality", "Latency": "Age (days)", "Created_on": "Created"},
    color_discrete_map={"Pareto Optimal": "#F4A261", "Dominated": "#6C757D"}
)

pareto_points_ep = df[df["Pareto_EP"]].sort_values(by="Effort")
if len(pareto_points_ep) > 1:
    fig_ep.add_scatter(
        x=pareto_points_ep["Effort"],
        y=pareto_points_ep["Priority"],
        mode="lines",
        line=dict(dash="dot", width=2),
        name="Pareto Frontier"
    )

fig_ep.update_layout(plot_bgcolor='white')
fig_ep.update_xaxes(showgrid=True, gridcolor='gray', gridwidth=1)
fig_ep.update_yaxes(showgrid=True, gridcolor='gray', gridwidth=1)
fig_ep.show()

fig_el = px.scatter(
    df,
    x="Effort",
    y="Latency",
    color="Pareto_EL_label",
    size=marker_sizes,
    hover_data=["Task", "Category", "Notes", "Effort", "Priority", "Latency", "Created_on"],
    title="Feature Roadmap: Effort vs Latency (Pareto Frontier, Circle Size = Effort)",
    labels={"Effort": "Effort (1-100 Scale, lower is better)", "Latency": "Age (days)", "Pareto_EL_label": "Optimality", "Priority": "Priority", "Created_on": "Created"},
    color_discrete_map={"Pareto Optimal": "#F4A261", "Dominated": "#6C757D"}
)

pareto_points_el = df[df["Pareto_EL"]].sort_values(by="Effort")
if len(pareto_points_el) > 1:
    fig_el.add_scatter(
        x=pareto_points_el["Effort"],
        y=pareto_points_el["Latency"],
        mode="lines",
        line=dict(dash="dot", width=2),
        name="Pareto Frontier"
    )

fig_el.update_layout(plot_bgcolor='white')
fig_el.update_xaxes(showgrid=True, gridcolor='gray', gridwidth=1)
fig_el.update_yaxes(showgrid=True, gridcolor='gray', gridwidth=1)
fig_el.show()

print("""

## Archived tasks

<details>
<summary>Show archived tasks</summary>
""")

archived_df = pd.read_csv('./roadmap/tasks.csv')
archived_df = archived_df[archived_df['Archived_on'].notna() & (archived_df['Archived_on'] != '')] if 'Archived_on' in archived_df.columns else pd.DataFrame()
if not archived_df.empty:
    archived_df['Notes'] = archived_df['Notes'].fillna("")
    archived_df.reset_index(drop=True, inplace=True)
    show(archived_df)

print("""
</details>
""")
```
